titles.title: I Know God That You Know

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There were times in my life, When God seems not to be around All the pains and sorrows I take it all alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know God that You know The sorrows in my heart The tears that flow But I know You'll be there I know God that you know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every night my tears are falling Everyday I keep on fighting Everywhere I keep on praying To help me to stand still

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the pain begins to strike me I almost forget Your love for me But I know You'll always be there To help me and hear my prayer
